---
name: Idea or feedback
about: Share a workflow idea, rough edge, or product suggestion
title: "[Idea] "

---

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the workflow, use case, or problem you care about.

## What feels missing or off?

Describe the rough edge, limitation, or idea.

## Why it matters

Explain the value or tradeoff.

## Anything else

Add links, screenshots, or extra context if useful.
